query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "imageUrl" = 'imageUrl' THEN 1 END) as literal_imageurl,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "imageUrl" LIKE 'http%' THEN 1 END) as has_real_url,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN "imageUrl" NOT LIKE 'http%' AND "imageUrl" != 'imageUrl' THEN 1 END) as other_format,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM recipes;

  COUNT(CASE WHEN "imageUrl" NOT LIKE 'http%' AND "imageUrl" != 'imageUrl' THEN 1 END) as other_format,
  COUNT(*) as total
